summary: iOS 🟥 TERN | INTERMITTENT | Primary earbud is not disconnected after placing it in charge case
scenario: Primary earbud remains connected with charging icon after being placed in charge case and lid closed on Voyager Free 60+
description_clean: Primary earbud is not disconnected after placing it in the charge case and closing the lid. Steps: Pair Free 60 earbuds with the app, place both earbuds in the case and close it, then open the case and take out the left earbud first, followed by the right earbud. Place the left earbud back in the case and close it. Observed: Sometimes the primary earbud is still displayed as connected with a charging icon, and no sound plays through it. Expected: Putting the earbud in the charge case and closing the lid should disconnect it.
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Pair the Poly Free 60 earbuds with the app (Home → Pair New Device → select Free 60).
3. Place both earbuds in the charging case and close the lid.
4. Open the charging case and remove the left earbud first.
6. Place the left earbud back into the charging case and close the lid.
7. Observe the connection status of the left earbud in the Poly Studio Mobile app (Home → [Free 60] → Device Settings).
expected: The left earbud should disconnect from the app and device when placed in the charging case and the lid is closed. No sound should play through the left earbud.
actual: Sometimes the primary (left) earbud is still displayed as connected in the app with a charging icon, and no sound plays through it.
